title: Surveillance video shows moment of China coal mine blast
full_text:
Surveillance video shows moment of China coal mine blast
Surveillance video shows moment of China coal mine blast
Surveillance video caught the moment a powerful explosion surged through the tunnels of a coal mine in China’s Shanxi Province on Friday night. At least 82 workers were killed, making it China’s deadliest mining disaster in a decade.
Published On 25 May 2026
